title: alsinopsis caroliniana
intro: Alsinopsis caroliniana, also known as Carolina alsinopsis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the waterwort family (Haloragaceae). It is primarily found in the southeastern United States, particularly in North Carolina, where it grows in wetlands and along streams. The medicinal properties of Alsinopsis caroliniana include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are believed to provide health benefits including pain relief, wound healing, and improved digestion.
